'''âw-m-p-j''' ('''kawampejoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:chainload|chainload]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-m-p-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:chainload|chainload]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âw-m-p-j
|-
! Lemma
| kawampejoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiwampejoko|thiwampejoko]] || [[word:jiwampejoko|jiwampejoko]] || [[word:shiwampejoko|shiwampejoko]] || [[word:kiwampejoko|kiwampejoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuwampejoko|thuthuwampejoko]] || [[word:jujuwampejoko|jujuwampejoko]] || [[word:shushuwampejoko|shushuwampejoko]] || [[word:kukuwampejoko|kukuwampejoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuwampejoko|thuwampejoko]] || [[word:juwampejoko|juwampejoko]] || [[word:shuwampejoko|shuwampejoko]] || [[word:kuwampejoko|kuwampejoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuwampejoko|thuwampejoko]] || [[word:juwampejoko|juwampejoko]] || [[word:shuwampejoko|shuwampejoko]] || [[word:kuwampejoko|kuwampejoko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thowampejoko|thowampejoko]] || [[word:jowampejoko|jowampejoko]] || [[word:showampejoko|showampejoko]] || [[word:kowampejoko|kowampejoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thowampejoko|thowampejoko]] || [[word:jowampejoko|jowampejoko]] || [[word:showampejoko|showampejoko]] || [[word:kowampejoko|kowampejoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠwampejoko|thĂŠwampejoko]] || [[word:jĂŠwampejoko|jĂŠwampejoko]] || [[word:shĂŠwampejoko|shĂŠwampejoko]] || [[word:kĂŠwampejoko|kĂŠwampejoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathawampejoko|thathawampejoko]] || [[word:jajawampejoko|jajawampejoko]] || [[word:shashawampejoko|shashawampejoko]] || [[word:kakawampejoko|kakawampejoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thawampejoko|thawampejoko]] || [[word:jawampejoko|jawampejoko]] || [[word:shawampejoko|shawampejoko]] || [[word:kawampejoko|kawampejoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thawampejoko|thawampejoko]] || [[word:jawampejoko|jawampejoko]] || [[word:shawampejoko|shawampejoko]] || [[word:kawampejoko|kawampejoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
